overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a sunset walk along Vespucci Beach promenade. The player walks past tennis courts and beach shops, turns to view the street-side storefronts, then circles the Muscle Sands outdoor gym while the setting sun casts orange reflections on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront promenade with tennis courts and benches

events.description: passes a pedestrian in a red shirt walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beachfront promenade past tennis courts on the left and storefronts on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking toward the camera along the promenade

entered.detail: green chain-link fence surrounding tennis courts with visible net
vertical sign for Pump & Run Gymnasium visible above rooftops
tall palm trees lining the promenade against the sunset sky
weathered concrete and wood benches along the walkway
black public waste bins placed periodically along the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide beachfront promenade at sunset, with tennis courts visible through green fencing on the left. The camera walks forward past concrete benches and trash cans, with palm trees silhouetted against the orange sky. A pedestrian in a red shirt approaches from the distance and is passed midway through the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: beachfront retail street with parked vehicles

events.description: camera turns right to face the street and the green Beach Shop building

agents.ego_description: turning toward the street to view the storefronts and parked car, then walking along the curb

entered.detail: two-story green building with pink trim and Beach Shop signage, closed metal shutters
compact silver hatchback parked along the street curb
red painted building adjacent to the green beach shop
wooden telephone poles with overhead wires lining the street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right toward the street, revealing a vibrant green Beach Shop building with pink accents and a parked silver car. The perspective shifts to walk along the asphalt street, passing utility poles and moving toward the adjacent red building while the tennis courts fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach retail strip with various storefronts and signage

events.description: property purchase prompt appears indicating the building costs $620,000

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various beach retail stores and examining the storefronts

entered.detail: green and yellow signage for Medical Marijuana Evaluation Center
storefront with red T-Shirts Towels signage and blue awning
white sign with red text reading DYNG FOR SALE with phone number
multi-story residential buildings with fire escapes above the shops

segments.scene_description: Walking along the enclosed sidewalk past various beach retail stores, the camera passes a medical marijuana dispensary and a T-shirts shop. A property for sale sign stands in front of one building. The green Beach Shop recedes into the distance on the left as the camera moves deeper into the retail strip.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor muscle beach gym with exercise equipment and ocean view

events.description: enters the Muscle Sands outdoor gym area with visible workout equipment
camera turns around to face back toward the city skyline and setting sun

agents.ego_description: walking around the outdoor gym area observing people exercising on the equipment and enjoying the beach view

notable_agents.action: NPC exercising on outdoor gym equipment doing pull-ups

entered.detail: outdoor exercise equipment including weight machines and pull-up bars in a fenced area
bright blue metal mesh fence surrounding the outdoor gym area
open view of the beach and ocean horizon visible beyond the gym
distant city skyline with tall buildings silhouetted against the sunset

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into the wide Muscle Sands outdoor gym area, enclosed by a bright blue fence and filled with exercise equipment. Several NPCs are working out on the machines. The camera circles the gym, revealing the beach and ocean beyond, then turns to showcase the downtown skyline glowing in the intense orange and pink sunset light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a beachfront promenade that transitions from open sports areas into a dense retail strip and finally opens up to a panoramic sunset view. It begins by moving past green-fenced tennis courts and silhouetted palm trees under an orange sky, passing a pedestrian in a red shirt along the concrete path. As the camera turns right, the perspective shifts from the promenade to the asphalt street, gliding past a vibrant green and pink beach shop and a parked silver car. The scene then narrows as the camera follows an enclosed sidewalk past a series of retail stores, including a marijuana dispensary and a T-shirt shop, while the beach shops recede into the distance. Finally, the path opens into the Muscle Sands outdoor gym enclosed by a blue fence, where the camera circles the exercising crowds to reveal the ocean and the downtown skyline glowing in intense orange and pink light.
